_comment: ERServer configuration. Copy this file to 'erserver.config.json' next to the
ERServer executable (or pass --config <path>) and fill in the real values.
ERServer reads ALL of its settings from this file - no environment variables.
This file holds SECRETS (database.password, auth.serverPepper): keep the real
erserver.config.json out of source control (it is gitignored) and protect it
with filesystem permissions / a mounted secret.
Every key is optional; omitted keys fall back to the documented defaults.

database._comment: Empty connectionString => run WITHOUT persistence (sim only). The base string carries NO credentials; user/password are appended for SQL-login auth.

auth._comment: serverPepper is applied in-process and NEVER stored in SQL. Generate a strong random value once and keep it stable.
